AttachPoint.description: The logical attachment point in your AWS network where the managed connection will be connected.

Arn.description: The ARN of the resource to attach to.

DirectConnectGateway.description: The ID of the Direct Connect Gateway to attach to.

CloudServiceProvider.description: The name of the cloud service provider.

LastMileProvider.description: The name of the last mile provider.

Tag.description: A key-value pair to associate with a resource.

Key.description: The key name of the tag. You can specify a value that is 1 to 128 Unicode characters in length and cannot be prefixed with aws:. You can use any of the following characters: the set of Unicode letters, digits, whitespace, _, ., /, =, +, and -.

Value.description: The value for the tag. You can specify a value that is 0 to 256 Unicode characters in length and cannot be prefixed with aws:. You can use any of the following characters: the set of Unicode letters, digits, whitespace, _, ., /, =, +, and -.

description: Resource Type definition for AWS::Interconnect::Connection. Creates a managed network connection between AWS and a partner cloud service provider.

ActivationKey.description: The activation key for accepting a connection proposal from a partner CSP. Mutually exclusive with EnvironmentId.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the connection.

AttachPoint.description: The logical attachment point in your AWS network where the managed connection will be connected.

Bandwidth.description: The bandwidth of the connection (e.g., 50Mbps, 1Gbps). Required when creating a connection through AWS.

BillingTier.description: The billing tier for the connection.

ConnectionId.description: The unique identifier for the connection.

EnvironmentId.description: The ID of the environment for the connection. Required when creating a connection through AWS. Mutually exclusive with ActivationKey.

OwnerAccount.description: The AWS account ID of the connection owner.

RemoteAccount.description: The remote account identifier for the connection. Required when creating a connection through AWS. Replaces RemoteOwnerAccount.

Identifier.description: The identifier of the remote account.

RemoteOwnerAccount.description: Deprecated. Use RemoteAccount instead. The account ID of the remote owner. Required when creating a connection through AWS.

SharedId.description: The shared identifier for the connection pairing.

State.description: The current state of the connection.

Tags.description: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.
